That would be great if no more Chinese in the world because the whole china should be divided by many kinds who embrace their own culture but not forced to be "chinese".

Shanghai people have their own culture, language and Identity.

Hong Kong has it too.

Beijing has it too.

Sichuan has it too.

Xinjiang has it too.

it is supposed to be no "One China".
Will you call a Scottish as a English? No man.
Being similar isn't being the same.

diu means fuck in Cantonese, our language.
Cao means fuck in mandarin, their language.
even the written character of this fuck words is different in "Chinese" character.
how can you mix us up for the "manner" of world order?

only Chinese (people) are!

East Turkestan, not Xinjiang.



Xinjiang literally means 'the new boundary'.
Imagine having your home invaded and not even the name of your homeland is spared but renamed 'the new boundary' of another country.
That's what the Uyghur people are forced to face.

Stop calling it Xinjiang the new boundary, call it the name Uyghur people use - East Turkestan.
